privileged_info_summary: Data is 100% synthetic, generated by odfpy Python script in setup_task.sh. Products sheet contains 5 items (P001-P005) with prices 29.99, 49.99, 15.99, 89.99, 12.50. Orders sheet maps 5 orders to these products (O001→P002, O002→P001, O003→P004, O004→P003, O005→P005). Expected output prices are [49.99, 29.99, 89.99, 15.99, 12.50]. Task requires VLOOKUP formulas in cells C2-C6 that reference the Products sheet. Success requires ≥3/5 formulas found, ≥3/5 prices correct, and ≥1 formula with proper sheet reference (66% threshold = 2/3 criteria). Task difficulty is 'medium', max 60 steps, 240 second timeout.
